view.title: Validate persona scenario #3

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior related to 'Trial account data sandboxing', but the evidence provided does not confirm whether this scenario has been executed or its outcomes captured. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide concrete evidence that supports the successful execution of this scenario or its expected results. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of direct evidence supporting the requirement.
